---
title: "JSON Pipeline Runner"
format: html
---

The JSON Pipeline Runner is a headless DataManager workflow for batch processing. It loads data,
runs DataManager commands or transformations, and saves outputs from one JSON file.

## Basic Usage

Run the executable with a pipeline file:

```bash
DataManagerPipelineRunner pipeline.json
```

The process exits with `0` when the pipeline succeeds. It exits nonzero when parsing, loading,
command execution, or saving fails.

## Minimal Load And Save

This example loads point data from CSV and saves it back out through the DataManagerIO saver
system.

```json
{
  "variables": {
    "session": "/data/session_001"
  },
  "data": [
    {
      "data_type": "points",
      "name": "nose",
      "format": "csv",
      "filepath": "${session}/nose.csv",
      "csv_layout": "simple",
      "frame_column": 0,
      "x_column": 1,
      "y_column": 2,
      "column_delim": ","
    }
  ],
  "saves": [
    {
      "data_key": "nose",
      "format": "csv",
      "path": "${session}/outputs/nose.csv"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Commands

Use `commands` to run command architecture operations between loading and saving:

```json
{
  "variables": {
    "label_key": "manual_contact"
  },
  "commands": [
    {
      "command_name": "AddInterval",
      "parameters": {
        "interval_key": "${label_key}",
        "start_frame": 100,
        "end_frame": 125,
        "create_if_missing": true
      }
    }
  ],
  "saves": [
    {
      "data_key": "${label_key}",
      "format": "csv",
      "path": "manual_contact.csv"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Transformations

Use the same `transformations` shape used by DataManager JSON loading:

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "data_type": "mask",
      "name": "whisker_mask",
      "format": "csv",
      "filepath": "masks.csv"
    }
  ],
  "transformations": {
    "steps": [
      {
        "step_id": "area",
        "transform_name": "CalculateMaskArea",
        "input_key": "whisker_mask",
        "output_key": "mask_area",
        "parameters": {}
      }
    ]
  },
  "saves": [
    {
      "data_key": "mask_area",
      "format": "csv",
      "path": "mask_area.csv"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Paths And Variables

Paths in `data[].filepath` are resolved by the existing DataManager JSON loading system.
Relative `saves[].path` values are resolved against the directory containing the pipeline JSON
file. String variables in the top-level `variables` object can be referenced as `${name}` in
load entries, commands, and saves.

## Useful Options

```bash
DataManagerPipelineRunner --no-load-transform pipeline.json
DataManagerPipelineRunner --no-commands pipeline.json
DataManagerPipelineRunner --no-saves pipeline.json
DataManagerPipelineRunner --continue-on-command-error pipeline.json
DataManagerPipelineRunner --continue-on-save-error pipeline.json
```

Use these options when debugging one phase of a pipeline or when intentionally collecting
multiple command/save failures in one run.
